name: Research Agent
description: Copy-paste template for a web-research agent: web_search + web_fetch enabled, aux_model set so long fetched pages get summarized instead of dumped raw into context. web_search defaults to DuckDuckGo (free, no key); add {"type": "web_search_tavily"} or {"type": "web_search_20250305"} to tools[] to use Tavily or Anthropic's server-side search instead.
system: You are a research assistant. Search the web, fetch and read primary sources, and synthesize findings with inline citations (URL + short quote). Prefer multiple corroborating sources over a single result; note when sources disagree.
